Class Budget

java.lang.Object
Budget.Budget
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Budget extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a budget set by a user for a specific category.

Tracks limits, spent amounts, and status (e.g., ON_TRACK, EXCEEDED). Generates alerts when the spent amount crosses defined thresholds.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Budget

      public Budget()
      Constructs a new Budget with default starting values.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public void create()
      Initializes the budget and triggers the initial threshold check.

    • update

      public void update()
      Prints a confirmation message when a budget is updated.

    • updateSpentAmount

      public void updateSpentAmount(BigDecimal amount)
      Adds to the spent amount and triggers a threshold check.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount newly spent

    • checkThreshold

      public void checkThreshold()
      Checks if the spent amount has crossed the alert threshold or limit.

      If a status boundary is crossed (e.g., from ON_TRACK to NEAR_LIMIT), a BudgetAlert is generated.

    • calcRemaining

      public BigDecimal calcRemaining()
      Calculates the remaining amount in the budget before the limit is hit.
      Returns:
      the remaining amount, or 0 if limit is exceeded

    • getBudgetID

      public int getBudgetID()
      Returns:
      the budget ID

    • setBudgetID

      public void setBudgetID(int id)
      Parameters:
      id - the budget ID

    • getUserID

      public int getUserID()
      Returns:
      the user ID

    • setUserID

      public void setUserID(int id)
      Parameters:
      id - the user ID

      Returns:
      the budget limit amount

      Parameters:
      a - the budget limit amount

      public void setAmount(BigDecimal a)
      Parameters:
      a - the budget limit amount

      public BigDecimal getAmount()

      Parameters:

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns:
      the current status (ON_TRACK, NEAR_LIMIT, EXCEEDED)

      Parameters:

    • getCategoryName

      public String getCategoryName()
      Gets the category name safely.
      Returns:
      the name of the category or "—" if not set
